name: Aromed 4.0 Vaporizer
summary: A German-built halogen desktop vaporiser with full temperature control and water filtration, for serious home use.
description: The AroMed 4.0 is a German-made desktop vaporiser that heats with a halogen bulb and draws through an all-glass vapour path with a built-in water filter for a notably smooth, cool draw. Temperature is fully adjustable across a wide range, and it handles dried herb, oils and extracts. It comes with a five-year warranty and a travel case, and suits committed patients who want a clean glass-and-water vapour path at home. It is a considered purchase at this price, and the glass-heavy design rewards careful handling — but for flavour-focused medicating it is a device people keep for years.
